      ├ù should render page header with "Add New Product" button (1 ms)
      ├ù should render SearchBar component (1 ms)
      ├ù should display all products initially
    Search Functionality
      ├ù should filter products when searching
      ├ù should show empty state when no results found (1 ms)
      ├ù should clear search with clear button (1 ms)
    Filter Functionality
      ├ù should render FilterPanel on desktop
      ├ù should apply category filter
      ├ù should display active filter chips
      ├ù should remove filter with chip X button
      ├ù should clear all filters with "Clear all" button
    Mobile Filter Drawer
      ├ù should show filter button on mobile
      ├ù should open filter drawer when clicking filter button (1 ms)
      ├ù should close drawer after applying filters (1 ms)
    Product Card Display
      ├ù should display product image, name, price (1 ms)
      ├ù should show promo badge for discounted products (1 ms)
      ├ù should display stock status badges (1 ms)
      ├ù should show Edit and View action buttons (1 ms)
    Loading States
      ├ù should show loading skeletons while fetching (1 ms)
      ├ù should hide loading skeletons after data loads (1 ms)
    Performance Optimizations
      ├ù should lazy load FilterPanel component (1 ms)
      ├ù should use standard grid for <= 100 products (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should use virtualized grid for > 100 products (1 ms)
    URL State Synchronization
      ├ù should reflect filters in URL query params (1 ms)
      ├ù should load filters from URL on mount (2 ms)

    ΓêÜ should accept zero as out of stock threshold (2 ms)
  Stock Adjustment Request Schema
    ΓêÜ should validate valid adjustment request (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ should require productId (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ should reject zero quantity change (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ should allow negative quantity change (3 ms)
    ΓêÜ should reject notes longer than 500 characters (9 ms)
    ΓêÜ should allow optional fields to be missing (1 ms)
  Batch Stock Update Request Schema
    ΓêÜ should validate valid batch request (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ should reject empty adjustments array (4 ms)
    ΓêÜ should validate mode enum (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ should reject invalid mode (2 ms)
  Type Guards
    isStockAdjustmentType
      ΓêÜ should return true for valid adjustment types (3 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return false for invalid types (2 ms)
    isStockThresholdConfig
      ΓêÜ should return true for valid threshold config (3 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return false for invalid threshold config (2 ms)
    isStockAdjustmentRequest
      ΓêÜ should return true for valid adjustment request (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return false for invalid adjustment request (2 ms)
  Helper Functions
    getReasonLabel
      ΓêÜ should return correct label for valid reason code (2 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return code if reason not found (1 ms)
    getReasonsForType
      ΓêÜ should return all reasons for a given type (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return correct number of reasons per type (1 ms)
    getStockStatus
      ΓêÜ should return "in-stock" for quantities above low stock threshold (3 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return "low-stock" for quantities at or below low stock threshold (3 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return "out-of-stock" for quantities at or below out of stock threshold (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should handle negative stock as out-of-stock (2 ms)
    calculateNewStock
      ΓêÜ should correctly add positive quantity change (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should correctly subtract negative quantity change (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should prevent negative stock (3 ms)
      ΓêÜ should handle zero quantity change (5 ms)
    validateStockAdjustment
      ΓêÜ should validate correct received adjustment (3 ms)
      ΓêÜ should reject received adjustment with negative quantity (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should validate correct sold adjustment (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should reject sold adjustment with positive quantity (2 ms)
      ΓêÜ should reject adjustment causing negative stock (5 ms)
      ΓêÜ should reject invalid reason code (2 ms)
      ΓêÜ should validate damaged adjustment (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should validate returned adjustment (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ should validate adjustment type adjustment (can be positive or negative) (1 ms)
